channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sticker, 27th March
item.description:
Whatever this is, sticker on traffic light at High Street/Southend Road junction on this side only (one traffic light mast).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12a, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spurgeon St, SE1 - Rubbish dog owner, 27th March
item.description:
Please clear dog waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spurgeon Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 27th March
item.description:
Political stickers on the traffic lights at High Street junction, just this one side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16-18, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe junction, 27th March
item.description:
When exiting Heath way to turn onto Barnehurst Avenue visibility is dangerously poor. Especially when van parked on Barnehurst avenue or on the yellow lines at school pick up time. You literally have to edge out into the road and cannot see any if any on coming traffic approaching. Cars also travel quite fast down the road so has potential for a serious accidents. Oncoming cars also get very irritate as they don't understand the limited visibility you have whilst coming out of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathway, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe crossing, 27th March
item.description:
Many cars park on the yellow lines, cars speed too fast, unsafe crossing area when children come.out of school. One child was run over this week and there are near misses daily.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnehurst Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Holes dug & nothing else happened in 3 weeks.., 27th March
item.description:
Holes dug 3 weeks ago & nobody been near or by since.. I’m getting sick of picking the yellow barriers up .. please can the contractor finish what they started or at least collect the yellow barriers. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkfield Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bridge needs repair, 27th March
item.description:
Resident has reported on social media “ please fix bridge over water. Posts loose. My 3 year old leant on it and it nearly collapsed. Belmont open space.”

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping opposite Eglinton school Paget Rise, 27th March
item.description:
There are about 8 mattresses, two fridge freezers load of tyres and rugs, broken glass - which is a danger to the wildlife and stray cats that live in that wooded area which we care about. It must have been dumped during Wednesday night early hours Thursday. The school has a camera just opposite so they may have caught something. There is another lot dumped on the bottom corner of same road at Eglinton Road - probably same people. It’s absolutely disgusting.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paget Terrace, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public bin overflowing, 27th March
item.description:
Public bin not emptied for some time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped Christmas tree, 27th March
item.description:
Christmas tree dumped in the space here since January …
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickfords Wharf, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on road very unsafe, 27th March
item.description:
This is very unsafe for cyclists and motorists. I cycle my kids to school and nursery every day on this road please can it be repaved. Bikes avoid the potholes and swerve out into traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess around the school is increasing, 27th March
item.description:
Dog mess around the school is increasing please can we encourage the public to clean up after their dogs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivydale Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not securing the rubbish in the bins, 27th March
item.description:
I got woken up at 3:50 by foxes making screaming sounds and when i went out to check the neighbours rubbish was all over the floor and foxes broke the food bags and ate them, this is the second time and i think it’s not normal action needs to be taken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Johns Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At lane way leading to Patterson Park, 27th March
item.description:
Clothing and domestic refuse dumped. Could it be taken away please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavements & gutters full of mud & vegetation, 27th March
item.description:
Street cleaners pick up litter in this section of the road but never actually sweep pavements or gutters between 63 & 99 Carpenter Gardens. No sweeping has taken place for years.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carpenter Gardens, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal food seller, 27th March
item.description:
Causing fat splashes on pavement and illegal too!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Newington Causeway, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Handrail missing on stairs, 27th March
item.description:
There is a set of stairs that elderly people use every day, I have witnessed a few people struggling to reach over a gap in the handrail where there is a long section of pole missing. A man already fell and seriously injured himself there two Christmases ago.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th March
item.description:
Graffiti on bin next to bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th March
item.description:
Graffiti under railway bridge on Norman Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 26th March
item.description:
Dumped wood taped up on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
